info.description: Global site configuration — branding, payments, commerce, social links

seo_description.description: Short summary for Google and ChatGPT (1-2 sentences, ~155 chars). Write what someone searching for this would actually type. Fills in automatically when you Save — leave blank unless you want to override

max_subcategories_per_menu.description: Maximum number of sub-menu items shown per top-level menu dropdown AND per section page tab row. Anna's design rule is 4 (editorial brevity, calm visual). Lift higher if you genuinely want more visible — no upper limit, but expect the layout to feel busier above 6-7. Set to a very large number (like 99) to effectively show all categories. Visitors can always reach hidden items via the 'All' page.

linkedin_url.description: Full URL to Anna's LinkedIn profile or company page. Shows as the LinkedIn icon in the footer.

podcast_url.description: Full URL to Anna's podcast (Apple, Spotify, podcast host page). Shows as the Podcast icon in the footer.

payment_reference_instruction.default: Use your order number as payment reference

default_currency.description: Three-letter ISO currency code (e.g. GBP, USD, EUR). Anna's shop is GBP.

supported_currencies.description: Currencies you accept, comma-separated three-letter ISO codes. Example: 'GBP, EUR, USD'. Default GBP-only for Anna.

free_shipping_threshold.description: Cart subtotal at or above this value qualifies for free UK shipping. Set to 0 to always charge shipping. Default £50.

free_shipping_label.default: Free UK shipping on orders over £50
free_shipping_label.description: Message shown on the cart page when the visitor qualifies / is close to qualifying for free shipping.

shipping_flat_rate.description: Flat shipping rate (£) charged when the cart subtotal is below the free-shipping threshold. Default £4.95.

gift_wrap_enabled.description: Show the optional gift-wrap toggle at checkout. Untick to hide the option entirely.

gift_wrap_price.description: Price (£) added to the order when the buyer ticks 'Add gift wrap'. Default £3.50.

gift_wrap_label.description: Short label shown next to the gift-wrap checkbox at checkout.

gift_wrap_description.default: Hand-tied with a satin ribbon and a card you can personalise.
gift_wrap_description.description: One-line description shown under the gift-wrap label at checkout.

google_analytics_id.description: GA4 measurement ID, e.g. G-XXXXXXXXXX. Get it from analytics.google.com → Admin → Data Streams. Once filled, GA4 tracking activates site-wide automatically (no code change).

facebook_pixel_id.description: Meta Pixel ID (15-16 digits). Get it from business.facebook.com → Events Manager → Data Sources. Required for Facebook/Instagram ads conversion tracking. Leave blank if not running Meta ads.

google_site_verification.description: Google Search Console verification token (HTML tag method). Paste only the content value (between quotes), not the full <meta> tag. Get it at search.google.com/search-console → Settings → Ownership verification → HTML tag.

bing_site_verification.description: Bing Webmaster Tools verification token. Get it at bing.com/webmasters → Site → Settings → Ownership verification → Meta tag. Paste only the content value.

pinterest_site_verification.description: Pinterest domain verification token. Get it at pinterest.com → Business hub → Claim website → HTML tag method. Paste only the content value. Lets Pinterest pull product feeds + show analytics.

cookie_banner_text.default: We use cookies to improve your experience. By continuing to visit this site, you agree to our use of cookies.

footer_short_about.default: A magazine for women coming back to themselves. Honest writing, somatic practice, and quiet rituals from Anna Lou Scaife.

contact_email.description: Email address. Format: name@domain.com — no spaces, must include the @ and the dot.

maintenance_message.default: We're making some improvements. Please check back shortly.
